title: Explanation-Based Learning Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of Explanation-Based Learning (EBL), where a specific training example is analyzed using domain knowledge to create a general, operational rule.
elements: Explanation (Proof of how example satisfies goal concept)
relationships: Training Example and Domain Theory are inputs used to construct an Explanation
The Explanation is generalized to form a new Generalized Rule
The Generalized Rule is added to the Knowledge Base for future use
